content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Serana: You ever notice how men brag about storming keeps but their swordplay lasts about as long as a Reachman’s sobriety? Fucking pathetic. If they spent half as much time learning deepthroat techniques as they did swinging dull iron, Skyrim might actually be worth ruling. Eydis: By Talos, you’ve got a mouth on you. My husband used to claim he could fight all night—guess that’s why the Legion drafted his lying ass. Serana: Oh honey, conscription’s just the Empire’s way of giving mediocre men a purpose. That, and target practice for vampires. Speaking of… your boy Skuli ever tried Skooma? I’ve got a recipe that’ll make his first time Eydis: Keep your devil potions away from my son! He’s got enough trouble keeping the drunks from sticking their cocks in the mead barrels. Serana: Fair. But if he ever wants to learn how to handle meat, MJR’s gargoyle could give him private lessons. That thing’s got a third leg thicker than a mammoth’s tusk. Eydis: Gods damn it, woman, this is a respectable establishment! Tiber Septim himself slept here— Serana: —And I bet he fucked in that legendary bed too. History’s just a list of people who came and went, darling. Literally. Eydis: You’re worse than the Forsworn. At least they just stab you and move on. Serana: Stabbing’s overrated. Ever been railed by a Draugr Deathlord? Their stamina? . Dibella’s tits, even the frostbite spiders here fuck better than most Nords. Eydis: You're making me miss the war. At least then the noise was just steel, not… whatever unholy racket you and that Dragonborn make. Serana: Oh, sweetheart, that steel. And magic. And a of Lydia screaming. You really should charge extra for the show. Eydis: Next you'll tell me you fucked the Ghost of Old Hroldan. Serana: Not yet. But MJR’s working on a summoning spell.
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.

Eydis: By the Nine, I need a drink after this conversation. And not the kind you spike with your vampire aphrodisiacs. Serana: Suit yourself, love. But when you're tired of pretending morals matter in this shithole province, I'll save you a spot in our next orgy. Dibella knows Skyrim could use more open-minded barkeeps. Eydis: Then Skyrim’s doomed. Now if you’ll excuse me, I’ve got mead to pour before the next batch of degenerates staggers in.

Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Eydis: By Talos’ crooked cock, if Skuli were here, he’d toss this piss-drunk milk-drinker into the mud where he belongs. Serana: Oh, I dunno—looks like he’s already face-down where he should be. Must’ve seen my tits and fainted. Happens a lot when creatures realize they’ll never get a taste of vampire pussy. You ever fuck a patron, Eydis? Or just disappoint them with lukewarm mead? Eydis: Hah! My husband ran off to ‘war,’ but between you and me? Last I saw him, he was getting railed by a skeever behind the stables. Gods know I’ve had better. You vampires—always bragging about stamina. Bet you’ve had your fangs in things worse than skeever. Serana: Honey, I once let a gargoyle me mid-air over Solitude while MJR cheered. But enough about my conquests—your boy Skuli. He ever catch you bent over Tiber Septim’s ‘historic’ bed with some hairy Reachman? Eydis: That brat walked in on Leontius eating my cunt like a sweetroll once. Kid just sighed and asked if we needed more firewood. ... Now that I say it out loud, maybe he’s Serana: Aww, future Thieves Guild material. But let’s be real—your ‘haunted’ inn’s most scandalous spirit is Eydis: Mara’s tits, that storm!
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.

Eydis: Storm's passing—barrels won't fill themselves. Gotta make sure the drunkards don't start humping the tables again. Serana: Typical Old Hroldan hospitality—furniture has more action than half the tavern patrons. Let me know if that changes—I'll bring MJR, Lydia, and a gallon of mead... for scientific research.
